name: library-add-follows
note: S-ADD-FOLLOWS (operator UAT 2026-07-17: 'when I add songs or progressions from library to the setlist, they disappear from my view instead of being highlighted with a check mark'). Two guards: (1) a fork/seed/custom add must leave the tapped row VISIBLE IN THE VIEWPORT and CHECKED after the re-render - the view follows the row wherever the merge places it (pendingHighlightId on every toggleSet add); (2) buildAllSongs shadows a fork IN PLACE (node-locked) so rows stop teleporting at all. Real flow: save a custom progression (setlist unchecked), find its library row, tap its +, assert visible+checked.

steps.label: uncheck add-to-setlist so the library + tap is the thing under test
the added row is CHECKED and FULLY INSIDE the viewport after the re-render - never vanished from view (the reported bug)
steps.js: (function(){var rows=Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('#songsList .listItem'));var r=rows.filter(function(x){return x.textContent.indexOf('Original track')>=0;})[0];if(!r)return false;var b=r.getBoundingClientRect();return r.classList.contains('inSet') && b.top>=0 && b.bottom<=window.innerHeight;})()
